The '''''Starfaring''''' was a [[Passenger liner/Legends|spaceliner]] that was crewed by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]]. It went missing in the [[Malrev system/Legends|Malrev system]], and was later [[Malrev incident|found]] by members of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].

{{Ship-stub}}
